verdict_reason: Three findings: critical null-safety issue with event.getData(), missing null-check on metadata, and unclear exception handling mixing two distinct failure modes.

todos.issue: event.getData() could be null, risking NPE in objectMapper.writeValueAsString()
todos.fix: Add null check: if (event.getData() == null) { log error and skip event }

todos.issue: event.getMetadata() is not null-checked before calling metadata.getCorrelationId() in buildMessageAttributes
todos.fix: Add null check for metadata in buildMessageAttributes or validate in OutboxEvent that metadata is always present

todos.issue: Both JsonProcessingException and SnsException are caught with identical handling (log + break), but JsonProcessingException indicates data serialization failure while SnsException indicates transient publish failure; these warrant different retry strategies per AC
todos.fix: Handle separately: JsonProcessingException should be logged as ERROR with event details for manual investigation; SnsException should skip to retry on next poll (current logic is OK for SnsException but muddies intent for both)
